## Verification Checklist

For dataset additions or corrections:

- [ ] Primary URL fetched and confirmed live
- [ ] License checked across 4 sources (website, GitHub, paper, download page)
- [ ] Download mechanism verified (not just landing page)
- [ ] Total Hours is a plain number (no parentheticals)
- [ ] Number of Participants is a plain number (no parentheticals)
- [ ] Category matches the standardized list
- [ ] License Type matches the standardized list
- [ ] Modalities use standardized terms (semicolon-separated)
- [ ] Access Level is one of: Open / Gated-Open / Restricted / Commercial / Unavailable
- [ ] No emoji in any CSV cell
- [ ] access_summary.csv counts updated
- [ ] accessibility_rankings.csv updated and re-ranked
